title: Solar Pump Controller Price in Pakistan 2026 — DC, MPPT & VFD Complete Buyer Guide
author: CNC Electric
tags: solar pump controller price in pakistan
summary_html: Complete buyer guide to solar pump controller prices in Pakistan 2026. Compare DC controllers (Rs 15,000), MPPT solar pump VFDs (Rs 55,000–1,80,000), and 15–22 kW drives (Rs 2,00,000+). Covers the AC-VFD vs DC-controller decision, PV array sizing rule (kWp ≈ 1.3–1.5 × motor kW), MPPT voltage-window matching, dual-supply solar+WAPDA operation, dry-run and surge protection, NEPRA off-grid rules, and a 10-point checklist for agricultural tubewells.
